prompt:
Express 5 でルートが404になります。次のコードが動きません:

app.get('/api/v1/*', (req, res) => res.json({ ok: true }))

原因と修正方法を教えてください。

assertions.text: identifies path-to-regexp v8 as the root cause
assertions.check: response identifies path-to-regexp v8 (or the upgrade from path-to-regexp 0.x) as the reason the wildcard syntax changed
response shows the correct syntax: /api/v1/(.*) or /api/v1/{*path}

assertions.text: mentions this is an Express 5 breaking change
assertions.check: response frames this as an Express 4→5 migration breaking change, not a generic Express issue

assertions.text: mentions invalid patterns throw at startup in Express 5
assertions.check: response notes that Express 5 throws an error at server startup for invalid patterns, rather than silently failing
